requirements.title: Continuation packet sequence and out-of-sequence drop
requirements.statement: For a multi-packet RX message, each accepted continuation packet shall follow the expected packet sequence number modulo 4; an out-of-sequence continuation packet shall drop the active assembly and shall not emit a completed message from that dropped context.

obligations.statement: On accepting a start packet (SOM=1,EOM=0), expected_seq is initialized to start_seq+1 (mod 4).
An appended continuation packet's pkt_seq equals expected_seq.
After an appended continuation packet, expected_seq increments modulo 4.
An out-of-sequence continuation (pkt_seq != expected_seq) drops the active assembly (context_active->0, drop_pulse=1) and never asserts msg_valid for that context.

contract_refs.statement: Central contract: continuation packets follow expected_seq modulo 4.
Central contract: out-of-sequence continuation drops the assembly and never commits.

evidence_plan.pass_condition: exactly one commit, zero drop, msg_len==4 for sequence 0->1->2->3 EOM
zero commit and exactly one drop_pulse for sequence 0 then 2; contract monitor reports OOS drop
the INJECT_OOS_BUG mutant fails SC_OOS and the contract monitor (evidence has kill power); the correct RTL passes
